assertions.text: Response explicitly flags that JUnit 5.10.0 is below the required minimum (5.11) and recommends upgrading
assertions.evidence: Lines 20-26 state 'Your current JUnit version is a problem. TableTest requires JUnit 5.11 or higher, but your pom.xml has 5.10.0' and recommends upgrading to at least 5.11.

assertions.text: Response provides the tabletest dependency with groupId 'org.tabletest' (not guessed)
assertions.evidence: Line 9 shows <groupId>org.tabletest</groupId> in the dependency block.
Line 10 shows <artifactId>tabletest-junit</artifactId> in the dependency block.
Line 12 shows <scope>test</scope> in the tabletest dependency block.
